title: User Authentication System for Booking History

subtasks.notes: Includes JWT setup, password hashing, and token management.

subtasks.notes: Not started. Will include login/signup forms, protected routes, and logout functionality.

subtasks.notes: Not started. Will include CSRF protection, rate limiting, validation, and admin dashboard integration.
